critical_code_review_comments: All 4 major features implemented correctly and working as expected
Branch teachers endpoint correctly filters by teacher_prices table and active status
Monthly program detailed endpoint provides comprehensive aggregated data for frontend
Teacher balance month filter correctly excludes camp earnings (camps are not month-specific)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. Created TEST_Note_Iteration6 and TEST_Verify_Persistence_Note for note testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 major features from iteration 6 are working correctly: 1) Branch teachers endpoint returns only active teachers assigned to that branch via teacher_prices, 2) Monthly program detailed endpoint provides comprehensive data with filters, editable notes, dynamic branch/teacher columns, 3) Teacher dashboard shows 5 cards (Öğrencilerim, Bakiye Takip, Ders Programı, Kamplarım, YouTube Kazançları), 4) Teacher balance has month filter that correctly filters lesson/youtube earnings and excludes camp earnings.

branch_teachers_endpoint.details: GET /api/branches/{id}/teachers returns only active teachers assigned to that branch via teacher_prices table

monthly_program_detailed.details: GET /api/monthly-program-detailed?month=X returns comprehensive aggregated data with students, branches, teachers, teacher_totals. Includes editable notes via PUT /api/monthly-program-notes/{student_id}

teacher_dashboard_cards.details: 5 dashboard cards: Öğrencilerim, Bakiye Takip, Ders Programı, Kamplarım, YouTube Kazançları

teacher_balance_month_filter.details: GET /api/teacher-balance/{id}?month=X filters lesson and youtube earnings by month, excludes camp earnings (camps are not month-specific)
